title: summary — a generated synthesis of one session
description: A CONTAINED kind: unlike session/subagent (bound, read from ~/.claude), a summary is derived state this workspace owns, stored in data/summary/. One per session, so its id IS the session's uuid (a foreign key, not a minted id — the kit never mints for this kind). Written only by tools/write_summary.py, which stamps source_size as the watermark the trigger algo (repo.summaries_due) compares against to decide staleness.

id.description: = session_id. One summary per session, keyed by the session uuid.

text.description: The synthesis — a few plain sentences.

generated_at.description: ISO local time the summary was written.

source_size.description: The transcript's byte size when summarized — the watermark summaries_due() compares live size against.

source_last_active.description: The transcript mtime at summary time.

user_turns_at_gen.description: Human turns counted when summarized (context, not the staleness signal).
